---
title: "OpticalPathAnnotation"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Named interval on an optical path.

Aliases: `Ann`, `Annotation`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `distance` | float | Start optical distance for this annotation. |
| `optical_length` | float | Optical path interval length described by this annotation in meters. |
| `label` | str | Human-readable label for this path annotation. |
| `notes` | str | Additional notes. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
